mapper.select:
select am.id, am.code, am.name, am.positions as positionsText, am.applicable_range as applicableRange, am.status, ( select count(1) from auth_policy ap where ap.deleted = 0 and (find_in_set(am.code, ap.auth_methods) > 0 or find_in_set(am.code, ap.mfa_methods) > 0) ) as referenceCount, am.sort_no as sortNo, am.description, am.params_json as paramsJson, am.create_time as createTime, am.update_time as updateTime from auth_method am
am.deleted = 0
and am.name like concat('%', #{request.name}, '%')
and am.code like concat('%', #{request.code}, '%')
and find_in_set(#{request.position}, am.positions) > 0
and am.status = #{request.status}
order by am.sort_no asc, am.create_time desc

select id, code, name, description, positions as positionsText from auth_method where deleted = 0 and status = 1
and find_in_set(#{position}, positions) > 0
order by sort_no asc, create_time desc

select ap.id, ap.code, ap.name, case when find_in_set(#{code}, ap.auth_methods) > 0 and find_in_set(#{code}, ap.mfa_methods) > 0 then '主登录 / MFA' when find_in_set(#{code}, ap.mfa_methods) > 0 then 'MFA' else '主登录' end as role, coalesce(r.name, '通用认证策略') as `usage`, ap.status from auth_policy ap left join realm r on r.id = ap.applicable_realm_id where ap.deleted = 0 and (find_in_set(#{code}, ap.auth_methods) > 0 or find_in_set(#{code}, ap.mfa_methods) > 0) order by ap.create_time desc
select count(1) from auth_policy where deleted = 0 and (find_in_set(#{code}, auth_methods) > 0 or find_in_set(#{code}, mfa_methods) > 0)
